differentials.raw: Amniotic band syndrome: multiple irregular asymmetric off-midline encephaloceles

differentials.raw: Meckel-Gruber syndrome = occipital encephalocele + microcephaly + cystic dysplastic kidneys + polydactyly

differentials.name: Nasofrontal (40-60%) =  herniation of dura mater through foramen cecum + fonticulus frontalis
differentials.raw: Nasofrontal (40-60%) =  herniation of dura mater through foramen cecum + fonticulus frontalis

differentials.name: Nasoethmoidal
differentials.raw: Nasoethmoidal (30%) =  persistent herniation of dural diverticulum through foramen cecum into prenasal space Site:  between nasal bone + nasal cartilage (beneath nasal bone + above nasal septum)

differentials.name: broad nasal root, hypertelorism, nasal stuffiness, rhinorrhea
differentials.raw: broad nasal root, hypertelorism, nasal stuffiness, rhinorrhea

differentials.name: change in size during crying / Valsalva maneuver
differentials.raw: change in size during crying / Valsalva maneuver

differentials.name: positive Fürstenberg test = change in size during jugular compression
differentials.raw: positive Fürstenberg test = change in size during jugular compression

differentials.name: Nasal glioma
differentials.raw: Nasal glioma (no subarachnoid connection on cisternography)

context: =  mesodermal defect of calvarial suture + dura with extracranial extension (= herniation) of intracranial structures and persistent connection to subarachnoid space Cranial meningocele: = herniation of meninges + CSF only Encephalocele = herniation of meninges (Meningoencephalocele)   + CSF + neural tissue Nomenclature:   based on origin of their roof + floor eg, frontonasal: frontal bone = roof, nasal bone = floor Prevalence: 1-4÷10,000 live births; 5-6-20% of all craniospinal malformations; predominant neural axis anomaly in fetuses spontaneously aborted < 20 weeks GA; 3% of fetal anomalies
